sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38353" key="e)pa/skhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπάσκ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n38353.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">method of fighting,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0074.tlg005:22:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.6</biblScope> </bibl> (pl., v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
